variants.name: 法老
variants.ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你可以选择剧本列表中最前的或最后的存活镇民中毒。你得知该角色。
variants.firstNightReminder: The Pharaoh points up to poison the highest alive Townsfolk or down to poison the lowest alive Townsfolk. Show them the token of the poisoned Townsfolk
variants.otherNightReminder: Wake the Pharaoh to show the currently poisoned Townsfolk if it has changed.
variants.flavor: The Tower of Babel was an insult to the gods. Worse than that, it was an insult to me.
